message.content:
@startuml
actor user
participant "Wrapped" as Wrapped1 #lightgray
participant "wrapped" as wrapped2 #lightgray

==  ==
activate Wrapped1 
user -> Wrapped1 : predict(X)  
note right of this line: **validate; strip**   
deactivate Wrapped1 

activate Wrapped1 
Wrapped1->Wrapped1++:**predict**(Xt)\n\nyt\ndd metadata \ny  

return y to user


@enduml
